info.title: DotNetChangelog
info.description: A .NET Tool for generating changelog based on .NET project dependencies, particularly useful for mono repos.

options.name: --repo-dir
options.description:
Required. Repo directory (default to current working
directory)

options.name: --from
options.description: Required. Starting git tag for Changelog

options.name: --to
options.description: Required. Ending git tag for Changelog

options.name: --change-log-mode
options.description:
Type of changelog to generate, Direct/Continuous
(default to Direct)

options.name: --tag-regex
options.description:
Regex pattern used to filter tags for target project
(only used in Continuous changelog mode)

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
Excluded projects pattern (dotnet Regular Expression
that will be matched against each Project's Full
Path, e.g. ".Tests.")

options.name: --output-dir
options.description:
Changelog output directory relative to repo root
(default to repo root directory)

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
Changelog output format (Console/Text/Json/Markdown,
default to Console)
